Your goal is to help implementing the UI component of the cloud matrix app.

Requirements for the UI component:

- The package is located [packages/ui](../../packages/ui)
- Use React and TypeScript
- Use shadcn/ui for UI components
- Use Tailwind CSS for styling
- Use Radix UI for accessibility
- Use `@tanstack/react-router` for routing
- Use `vite` for building the package
- Create new routes in `src/routes`
- Create new pages in `src/pages`
- Create common components in `src/components`
- Create common hooks in `src/hooks`
- Create modules in `src/modules` incapsulating the logic
